hierarchy.rationale: The brand mark, concise promise and single governed entry action create an unmistakable first-fold reading order.
hierarchy.evidence: desktop and mobile anonymous first-fold baselines

proportions.rationale: The asymmetric lead and oversized isotype remain balanced at desktop while recomposing cleanly into the compact mobile crop.

rhythm.rationale: Open negative space and a restrained status rail separate product promise, action and operational context without dead zones.

density.rationale: Only identity and access facts appear; no speculative project or provider data inflates the launch foundation.

depth.rationale: Orbital lines, radial light and mark scale establish atmospheric depth without decorative card stacks or heavy shadows.
depth.evidence: desktop and mobile anonymous first-fold baselines

surfaceEconomy.rationale: The composition is an open plane with one identity band and one status rail, avoiding card wallpaper entirely.
surfaceEconomy.evidence: enterprise rubric pass and desktop baselines

visualImpact.rationale: The architectural Globe isotype and near-poster typography create a memorable arrival appropriate for a creative production platform.

typography.rationale: Local Poppins and Geist assets provide a strong display-to-operational hierarchy with controlled measure and legibility.

color.rationale: Midnight, azure and paper preserve Globe identity while green and orange remain semantic connection and focus signals.
color.evidence: zero axe contrast findings in premium GVC

iconography.rationale: The canonical balloon mark dominates and the few directional or status symbols reinforce meaning without an invented icon system.

responsive.rationale: The 390-pixel composition preserves brand, action and status with exact zero page overflow and full-width touch targets.
responsive.evidence: mobile baselines and scrollWidth equals clientWidth evidence

motion.rationale: A short causal entrance and pending feedback use local tokens, while reduced motion reaches the same final state immediately.
motion.evidence: GVC keyboard and reduced-motion frames plus recording

fidelity.rationale: Supplied SVG and font assets are used without redrawing the mark, and their provenance is recorded beside the runtime copies.
fidelity.evidence: canonical assets, provenance file and durable baselines

genericTemplateResistance.rationale: Orbital Threshold reads as a branded creative-platform threshold rather than a Vuexy dashboard, SaaS landing template or KPI grid.
genericTemplateResistance.evidence: visual direction decision and enterprise rubric pass
